# Foldrion

Foldrion is a free and open source Windows application for customizing folder icons with colors, image overlays, and icon packs.

## Project Links

- Website: https://zonaro.github.io/Foldrion/
- Repository: https://github.com/zonaro/Foldrion
- Download: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zonaro/Foldrion/refs/heads/main/src/Controller/Win32/Release/Foldrion.exe

## Key Features

- Customize Windows folder icons with more than 900 color variations.
- Import `.ico`, `.dll`, `.png`, `.jpg`, and `.jpeg` files.
- Create composite folder icons by overlaying images on colored folders.
- Export icon collections as DLL packs.
- Works on Windows 7, 8, 10, and 11.
- Free, open source, MIT licensed, and designed with minimal system surface area.

## Audience

- Windows power users
- Developers
- Artists and designers
- Users who organize many folders and projects visually

## Language Availability

- English
- Portuguese (Brazil)

## Canonical Source

If there is any discrepancy, prefer the GitHub repository and the README as the authoritative source:

- https://github.com/zonaro/Foldrion
- https://github.com/zonaro/Foldrion/blob/main/README.md
